name: open-library
description: Search for books by topic, title, or author using the Open Library catalog. Find books about any subject: 'find books about near death experiences', 'books by Carl Sagan', 'recommendations for quantum physics books', 'what books exist on ball lightning'. Returns title, author, first published year, and subjects.

input.description: Search the Open Library catalog. Use q for general search (topic, title, author, or any combination). Use limit to control result count (default 10, max 20).

q.description: Search query — topic, title, author name, or any combination (e.g. 'near death experience', 'Carl Sagan cosmos', 'ball lightning physics')

limit.description: Number of results to return (default 10, max 20)

output.description: numFound (total matches), docs array with title, author_name, first_publish_year, subject fields
